# Fitness Ritual

> Fitness Ritual is a health and wellness blog for adults 50+, published by CLICKANDDEALONLINE LLC. We cover practical advice on exercise, nutrition, healthy aging, mental wellness, and weight management — written in plain, friendly English with no jargon.

## About

- [About Fitness Ritual](https://www.fitness-ritual.com/about): Who we are, our editorial mission, and our approach to healthy aging content.
- [Contact](https://www.fitness-ritual.com/contact): Send us a message via our contact form.

## Blog & Articles

- [All Articles](https://www.fitness-ritual.com/blog): Browse our full library of health and wellness articles for adults 50+.

## Categories

- [Exercise & Fitness](https://www.fitness-ritual.com/category/exercise-fitness): Low-impact routines, strength training, balance, and mobility for older adults.
- [Nutrition & Diet](https://www.fitness-ritual.com/category/nutrition-diet): Practical eating advice, calorie awareness, and healthy food choices after 50.
- [Healthy Aging](https://www.fitness-ritual.com/category/healthy-aging): Evidence-based tips for staying active, sharp, and well as you age.
- [Mental Wellness](https://www.fitness-ritual.com/category/mental-wellness): Stress management, sleep, mindfulness, and emotional health for adults 50+.
- [Weight Management](https://www.fitness-ritual.com/category/weight-management): Sustainable approaches to maintaining a healthy weight after 50.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.fitness-ritual.com/privacy-policy): How we collect and use data.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.fitness-ritual.com/terms-of-service): Terms governing use of this site.
- [Affiliate Disclosure](https://www.fitness-ritual.com/affiliate-disclosure): We may earn commissions on some links at no cost to you.
- [Health Disclaimer](https://www.fitness-ritual.com/health-disclaimer): Our content is informational only, not medical advice.

## Tools

- [Kalorix — Calorie & Macro Tracker](https://kalorix-nine.vercel.app): Our free companion app for tracking calories and macros, available in English, French, and Spanish.
